name: Scorpion
description: Scorpion is a Dahl SMG from a fixed-element set that always spawns with a Maliwan barrel, giving it stronger status chance and damage over time than a typical SMG in its tier. Because its parts are locked, it appears far less often than its rarity suggests and is easy to overlook, but its reliable elemental output can carry fights for a long time.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. It only appears at green rarity or higher. Other Dahl SMGs in the same fixed-element Maliwan-barrel group are Beetle, Eel, Jackal, and Yeti.
